summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vendor Bill + 3-Way Matching feature (Fase 5.2 — P0-2). Backend: 52/52 tests PASS. Frontend: All critical UI components verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Authentication (admin, manager, sales) - 3/3 PASS
Backend: GET /purchase-orders - 200 OK, PO-00001 and PO-00003 found
Backend: GET /purchase-orders/{po_id}/billing-context - Returns items with ordered_qty, received_qty, already_billed_qty, billable_received, po_price
Backend: POST /vendor-bills (matched + submit_now=true) - Creates bill with match_status='matched', status='posted', auto-posts without approval
Backend: PPN computation - PPN=0 for non-PKP (PO-00001), PPN>0 for PKP (PO-00003)
Backend: PO billing sync - billed_total updated after bill creation
Backend: GET /vendor-bills/payables/summary - Returns total_outstanding, aging buckets (0-30/31-60/61-90/>90), by_supplier, bills array
Backend: POST /vendor-bills/{id}/pay - Partial payment keeps status='posted', payment_status='partial'; full payment sets status='paid'
Backend: Cash transaction - ref_type='vendor_bill' created correctly
Backend: Over-billing - match_status='blocked', submit returns 400
Backend: Price variance - match_status='warning', status='pending_approval', SoD prevents creator from approving, manager can approve
Backend: RBAC - Sales role cannot create (403), can view (200)
Backend: Dedupe - Duplicate supplier_invoice_no returns 409
Frontend: Navigation to Vendor Bills page via Pembelian → Tagihan Supplier
Frontend: AP summary cards displayed with total_outstanding and aging buckets
Frontend: Status tabs present (all, draft, pending_approval, posted, paid, cancelled)
Frontend: Bills list showing 5 bills with match status badges (Match, Selisih, Over-bill) and status pills
Frontend: Detail panel opens on bill click
Frontend: Detail panel components - Bill number (VB-00005), Status (Draft), Match status (Match Bersih)
Frontend: Financial cards - Total Tagihan (Rp 488.400), Sudah Dibayar (Rp 0), Sisa Hutang (Rp 488.400), PPN Masukan (Rp 48.400)
Frontend: 3-way match indicator showing 'Match bersih: qty & harga sesuai PO/penerimaan'
Frontend: Items table with columns: Produk, Pesan, Terima, Tagih, Harga PO, Harga Bill, Subtotal
Frontend: Timeline (Riwayat) showing bill creation event
Frontend: Action buttons (Submit, Batalkan) present and status-dependent

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all critical components working, create modal items loading not fully tested due to timing)
